title: Delete all containers and pods between tests
body:
New tearDown() deletes all pods and containers between tests

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

@cevich From your request via email.  If this is the correct branch, feel free to remove draft label

The v3.0 branch is in the process of dying at this point - I'm hoping to get back to work on 3.1 tomorrow, get an RC out, and once the final release happens soon after the v3.0 branch will become inactive.
@mheon Given your input and that the patch didn't apply cleanly. How about we just close this PR?
